title: get stream with valid video url
description: Test GET /api/stream with a valid external video URL query parameter to verify it returns HTTP 200 and streams the video content successfully.

title: get stream without url parameter
description: Test GET /api/stream without the required url query parameter to verify it returns HTTP 502 Bad Gateway indicating upstream fetch failure.

title: get stream with invalid video url
description: Test GET /api/stream with a malformed or unreachable video URL to verify it returns HTTP 502 Bad Gateway and handles stream load failure properly.

title: get proxy with valid image endpoint
description: Test GET /api/proxy with a valid image URL in the endpoint query parameter to verify it returns HTTP 200 and the proxied image bytes.

title: get proxy without endpoint parameter
description: Test GET /api/proxy without the required endpoint query parameter to verify it returns HTTP 400 Bad Request and client shows an error or fallback image.

title: get proxy with invalid image endpoint
description: Test GET /api/proxy with a malformed or inaccessible image URL in the endpoint query parameter to verify it returns HTTP 500 Internal Server Error and client handles image load failure.
